title: Essentially Emerald
description: Adds vanilla-friendly, emerald tools and armor to Minecraft.
body:
#### _Essentially Emerald 1.19.x version is temporarily only available on **Forge** mod loader._

Essentially Emerald adds lightweight and vanilla-friendly additions to Minecraft. The added emerald tools and armor fits in seamlessly with the default game and provides an early-game alternative to diamond quality tools.


Along with crafting, various emerald gear has a small chance to spawn in chests generated at:

-   Village armorers, toolsmiths, and weaponsmiths
-   Pillager outposts and woodland mansions
-   Ancient Cities

----------

### Stats and Durability

----------

Since emeralds are of high quantity in villages:

-   Tools and Weapons are of diamond quality equivalence but have the durability between stone and gold.
-   Armor is of diamond quality equivalence but has slightly better durability above gold.
     - Emerald armor also does not provide any toughness stat
-   Horse Armor is slightly better than its gold counterpart.
-   Emerald gear has the lowest enchantibility factor under iron

##### **Texture Showcase:**

**![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/gZhBVhK.png)**

----------

### Crafting Recipes

----------

The crafting recipes are like any other vanilla Minecraft recipe except you use emeralds as the core ingredient.
